summary: GH-100 post-merge closeout carrier sync is approved for merge. The closeout evidence-map and task-carrier consume the already merged desktop shell skeleton PR #126 and keep the spec boundary limited to the minimum runnable Electron/Vite/React/TypeScript shell foundation.
reviewed_validation_summary: `git diff --check` passed; `loom fact-chain --target . --json` passed; `loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-100 --json` passed; `loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-100 --json` passed; `loom doctor --target . --json` passed; `loom verify --target . --json` passed. Post-merge closeout consumed PR #126, implementation head 8b5bbefafb70fd5dcf3b0d8777bf71580f693720, merge commit ffb977d3b2d26236872a9d0a46052914cc4f4338, target branch main, hosted run https://github.com/WebEnvoy/App/actions/runs/28636400102, and closed issue #100.
follow_ups: #101/#102/#103/#104 must not treat this spec approval as completion of primitives, source health, Settings, Task Thread layout, task submission, run/result views, evidence rendering, Browser management, or Library management.
This approval only covers post-merge closeout carrier synchronization for GH-100.

consumed_inputs.suite_validation: loom suite evidence validate --target . --item GH-100 --json; loom suite carrier validate --target . --item GH-100 --json
consumed_inputs.closeout_scope: post-merge carrier sync only; no product code or behavior change
